doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in State Bar of California records, and its core provision purporting to waive unauthorized-practice liability under B&P §6125 without pre-filing attorney review is incompatible with California law.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: No such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in the State Bar of California's published rules or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission materials, and the document's core provision—waiving the unauthorized-practice-of-law prohibition under B&P §6125 for paralegals acting without pre-filing attorney review—is inconsistent with California law and State Bar regulatory practice, strongly indicating this is a fabricated document.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in State Bar of California records, and its core provision purporting to waive unauthorized-practice liability under B&P §6125 without pre-filing attorney review is incompatible with California law.
